task_description: Debug the following multi-file Python application for an order processing system. There are bugs across files that interact with each other, causing incorrect totals and failed order processing.

test_cases.name: Basic order total
test_cases.action: proc = OrderProcessor(inv); order = proc.create_order('Alice', [('Widget', 3), ('Gadget', 2)]); summary = proc.get_order_summary(order)

test_cases.name: Order with 10% discount
test_cases.action: proc = OrderProcessor(inv); order = proc.create_order('Bob', [('Widget', 5)], discount_percent=10); summary = proc.get_order_summary(order)

test_cases.name: Stock check at exact boundary
test_cases.expected: Should succeed - 5 items with 5 in stock
